Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.
Video.title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Image.alt: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: The transformation continues on this clean '85 K-10 square body.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Video.summary: Our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body gets stripped, sanded and primed. Then we add a two-tone paint job.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Video.summary: The frame work for our 1985 Chevy K-10 is being blasted and painted.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Video.summary: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Video.summary: Our K-10 Square body is coming back to life with restoration parts, cooling, and electrical.
Video.title: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Image.alt: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Video.summary: We wrap up our Chevy K-10 square body build with the final assembly of trim work, bumpers, and more
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys slam over a 1,000 horsepower into a huge mid-70’s Mercury with a sadistic streak.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Video.summary: The Mercury build continues with ignition, exhaust upgrade and fuel system to handle a 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Part II

Video.summary: Adding an indestructible 9-inch and air suspension to our sleeper 1,080-horse ’72 Marquis Brougham
Video.title: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Video.summary: The guys button up the last few details on their 1100 horsepower Mercury Monster and take her for a spin.
Video.title: The Highwayman - Odds & Ends

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: The Tech team picks up a new project, a 1974 Ford F-100 and bring it back to the shop for a quick inspection.
Video.title: F-100 Purchase and Baseline

Video.summary: The 1974 F-100 is back in the shop for its first round of upgrades.
Video.title: F-100 Stage One Suspension

Video.summary: Truck Tech's builders compete to see who can build the best muscle truck.
Video.title: Muscle Trux Build Off

Video.summary: We reveal plans to transform a '61 Chevy Impala into "Red Sled." Then an appraisal on the finished LeMans.
Video.title: Project Red Sled Debut

Video.summary: '61 Impala frame enforcement, Air Ride suspension system installation, and driving Year One's '67 Mustang.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Frame Work

Video.summary: We powder coat a 61 Impala's frame and explore the allure of a 67 Corvette Stingray.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Bodywork

Video.summary: We continue on a 1969 Firebird, taking off the rusty sub-frame and modifying the Impala, known as 'Red Sled'.
Video.title: Red Sled Sheet Metal

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road

Video.summary: The engine goes back together in the '74 Ford as the guys hope to improve power of this weak 351 Windsor. New rubber, rims and custom exhaust will wrap up Stage 1.
Video.title: F100 Stage 1 Wrap-Up

Video.summary: We take the freshened-up Ford and slap her back on the chassis dyno.
Video.title: '74 Ford F100 Payoff

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team dives into building a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.
Video.title: Mustang Backside Alterations

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang has to hook and stick to the ground.
Video.title: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Image.alt: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang is transformed.
Video.title: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Image.alt: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew creates a custom exhaust with some TIG Tech.
Video.title: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Image.alt: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team goes all in to reveal their supercharged pony.
Video.title: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Image.alt: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: Ford’s high-revving modern engine gets some racy parts, then it is put to the test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Coyote Power

Video.summary: We transform a Chevy C-1500 into a pro-touring sport truck.
Video.title: Pro Touring Sport Truck

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc are under a 2008 Ford Crown Vic police cruiser to add some high pursuit performance.
Video.title: Crown Vic
